creator: yuripv@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nht from comment #5)
Missed this, sorry.

EOL remark still stands, and even if it didn't, release is what it is, you should either switch to newer one that has the bug you are reporting fixed, or backport the related fixes to older *unsupported* release.

I don't think there are any actionable items in this PR as it is reported to be not a problem in supported releases.
